use_case: W2 §6/§9 — the headline demo scenario: 'should we intensify her statin?' answered with claims that mix patient-record citations (Chen lipid + intake) AND guideline citations (USPSTF + ADA). A regression that breaks heterogeneous claim sets (e.g. only validates the first source_type) would slip past lab_pdf-only and guideline-only cases.

claims.text: LDL 158 mg/dL is above goal (<100) for a patient with T2DM
Patient self-reports current metformin therapy and T2DM diagnosis
USPSTF recommends statin intensification in adults with T2DM and elevated LDL

citation.quote_or_value: Adults with diabetes and elevated LDL benefit from high-intensity statin therapy.

claims.text: ADA recommends statin therapy in T2DM regardless of baseline LDL

citation.quote_or_value: All patients with type 2 diabetes should be considered for statin therapy.
